name: IRONSIGHT
description: IRONSIGHT (github.com/NoblerWorks-HQ/IRONSIGHT, by Nobler Works) — a real-time OSINT command center monitoring the Middle East conflict, aggregating 50+ free no-key public sources (20+ RSS news feeds, 27 Telegram channels, conflict/strike events, regional threat levels, military aircraft & naval tracking, missile alerts, satellite thermal detection). This connector imports IRONSIGHT's OSINT intelligence feeds (news, Telegram, conflicts, strikes, regional alerts) and maps each item to an XORCISM threat-intel record (XTHREAT.INTELEXCHANGE): headline/post -> IntelName, summary + classification -> description, source link -> reference, with source/region/category/severity as tags and conflict actors (IDF/IRGC/Hezbollah/Hamas/Houthi…) and any referenced CVE extracted. Worker-safe: parses an exported feed file, or reads a running IRONSIGHT instance's read-only API routes; no DB access.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An IRONSIGHT feed export in JSON: an array of items, or an object keyed by feed (news/telegram/conflicts/strikes/regionalAlerts[]). If omitted, the IRONSIGHT_URL env (worker) is read.

parameters.name: kinds
parameters.help: Comma-separated feeds to import: news,telegram,conflicts,strikes,regional-alerts (default: all of these).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of intel items to import across all feeds (default 500).

parameters.name: min_severity
parameters.help: Only import event items at or above this severity (low|guarded|elevated|high|critical). Applies to items that carry a severity/threat level (conflicts/strikes/regional alerts); news & Telegram items have none and are always included. Default: import all.
